raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase with my citi credit card. The product i order was a XXXX XXXX XXXX The product i received was tampered with. This effects the value and trust worthiness of the card and value. I disputed with the merchant. They refused to response. I filed a fraud case because the cards have been tampered with. Citi credit fraud department sent corresponding through the XXXX XXXX instead of paperless like I requested. I XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and told them that. I have called over XXXX times as well as they have called me but with automated service asking for payment. The proof they wanted can't be obtained in just days. It has to be sent off and verified and that can take months through psa. Now they want a full XXXX dollar or ruin my credit this isn't right! They refused to work with me or verify the issue by escalating the call to proper channels. The picture i upload shows they are supposed to contact me paperless!!
